ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot playfully reaching up towards a balloon, expressing excitement and anticipation. The sequence begins with both arms relaxed at the sides, then transitions to a reaching motion with both arms extending upward, followed by a slight adjustment as if the robot is about to grasp the balloon, and finally it returns to a relaxed state.  The left arm will move slightly forward to enhance the sense of reaching while the right arm will act as a counterweight.  The movements are exaggerated slightly to increase the expressiveness of the animation.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, anticipating the balloon
both arms reach up, eager to touch the sky
stretching higher, almost grasping the floating prize
arms fall back, the balloon drifts away
